'''magufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinopyranosyl|arabinopyranosyl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinopyranosyl|arabinopyranosyl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| magufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || mægifith || mægifij || mægifish || mægifi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || magugufuth || magugufuj || magugufush || magugufu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || magufuth || magufuj || magufush || magufu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || maguffufth || maguffufj || maguffufsh || maguffuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || magufuthu || magufuju || magufushu || magufuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || magufuth || magufuj || magufush || magufu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || magufuthul || magufujul || magufushul || magufukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || magufuuthuthu || magufuujuju || magufuushushu || magufuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || magufuthun || magufujun || magufushun || magufukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || magufuthuoro || magufujuoro || magufushuoro || magufukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
